title: Pink Balloons, Pack of 100 Pink Balloons, 10 Inch Latex Balloons, Birthday, Balloons, Pink, Balloon Party Decoration, Birthday, Wedding, Baby Shower, Festival, Anniversary Decoration
features: Pink balloons: you will receive 100 pink latex balloons. This complete set offers everything you need to make your party an unforgettable experience with an elegant and warm colour atmosphere.

High-quality material and durable: Our pink balloons are made of high-quality, environmentally friendly natural latex. The material is particularly strong, stretchy and tear-resistant, so the balloons remain intact throughout your event and do not burst easily.

Easy to inflate and versatile: the balloons can be easily filled with air or helium (a pump is recommended). Tip: Fill 85-90% to achieve optimal shape and durability. They are perfect for imaginative decorations on occasions such as birthdays, weddings and celebrations.

Important safety instructions: Choking hazard. Uninflated or burst balloons can be accidentally inhaled by children under the age of 8 and cause fatal choking hazard.Keep away from children under 8 years.Always inflate and use under adult supervision.Dispose of burst balloons immediately.Latex allergy warning: This product contains natural rubber latex, which can cause allergic reactions in sensitized people.

Ideal decoration and satisfaction: these versatile pink balloons are the ideal decoration for parties of all kinds and add a festive touch to any occasion. If you still have any questions, our customer service is happy to help.
